headline: Your Smile Deserves Expert Care
subheadline: Gentle, comprehensive dentistry for the whole family — from first checkups to complete smile transformations.
about: Westview Family Dental has served Mississauga families for over 15 years. We combine modern dental technology with a calm, welcoming environment so patients of all ages feel comfortable and cared for. Our team takes the time to explain every treatment clearly — no surprises, no pressure.

services.name: Preventive Care
services.description: Regular cleanings, exams, and X-rays to keep your smile healthy.

services.name: Teeth Whitening
services.description: Professional in-office whitening for visible results in one visit.

services.name: Dental Implants
services.description: Permanent, natural-looking replacements for missing teeth.

services.name: Invisalign
services.description: Discreet, removable aligners to straighten your smile over time.

services.name: Emergency Care
services.description: Same-day appointments for tooth pain, broken teeth, and urgent issues.

services.name: Children's Dentistry
services.description: A friendly, gentle approach that makes kids actually look forward to the dentist.

metaDescription: Gentle family dentistry in Mississauga. Accepting new patients. Call 905-555-0187.
